title: Unrecognized node type error in evolutionApi node
symptom: When running a workflow with the evolutionApi node, n8n throws an 'Unrecognized node type: evolutionApi.undefined' error.
not_this_if: The node type is recognized and functioning correctly
root_cause: This error occurs when the evolutionApi node is not properly recognized by n8n, often due to issues with the node installation or the workflow configuration. It can happen if the node was updated or if there are remnants of an old configuration.
fix_steps: Delete the existing workflow that contains the evolutionApi node
Create a new workflow and add the evolutionApi node again
agent_instruction: Delete the workflow and the evolutionApi node, then create a new workflow and reinstall the node.
safety_notes: Ensure to back up your workflow before deletion to avoid data loss.
